title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Kozuki Alliance, Unknown person #3, Kid, Unknown person #4 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A strike that breaks the very stone!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a minute! That guy's not one of us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What!? Another one of the worst generation....!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was supposed to be locked up in upon, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell!? I thought things were fine at Udon!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: Joining our Alliance was just a ploy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I should've figured it out then and there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were working for Kaido the whole time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, stop! Even if you kill them, do you really think they'll make you part of the flying six!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Waaah! Stop, you're gonna hurt someone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Is this guy a giant!? He's massive!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 31 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
